checkout.title: Checkout

checkout.swishInstructions: Scan the QR code below to pay via Swish

footer.tagline: Made with love for Indian and Swedish food lovers

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Browse our menu, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. Enter your name and mobile number, choose your payment method, and confirm your order.
faq.a2: We accept Swish (scan the QR code) and Cash. Pay when you pick up your food.
faq.q3: Where do I pick up my order?
faq.a3: Pickup location and time will be shared in your order confirmation. We're based in Malmö, Sweden.
faq.a4: Yes! All our meat dishes are prepared with halal certified ingredients.
faq.a5: Absolutely! We have a wide range of delicious vegetarian dishes. Look for the green leaf icon.
faq.a6: Please contact us immediately via WhatsApp if you need to modify your order before it's prepared.

gdpr.message: We respect your privacy. We only store order-related information required for food delivery and pickup.
